name: docx_media
description: Insert, extract, or replace images — the media part, relationship, and content-type registration are handled as one operation. Insert positions after/before an existing anchor; extract/replace target media ids like 'M2' shown in projections.

after.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Insert the image after this paragraph (op 'insert').

before.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Insert the image before this paragraph (op 'insert').

image.description: Path to the source image file (ops 'insert'/'replace').

width_cm.description: Display width in centimeters; aspect ratio is preserved when height_cm is omitted.

path.description: Output file path for the extracted image (op 'extract').

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
